name: Caramel Turnips
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and peel the turnips, cut into four pieces each.
2. Put the dried plums in water until they are half-soft.
3. Boil water with some salt, then cook the turnips for about 15 minutes.
4. Wash and dry the meat.
5. Chop the plums and season with mustard, salt, and pepper.
6. Place the turnips in a colander and let them drain well.
7. Wash the parsley and remove the leaves; discard the stems.
8. In a skillet, caramelise the sugar, add broth, and vinegar. Simmer for about 5 minutes.
9. Add the turnips to the skillet and simmer for another 5 minutes.
10. Divide the plum mixture between two vealchops. Add parsley, roll up, and secure with toothpicks.
11. In hot oil, fry both sides of the rolls for about 2 minutes.
12. Heat water according to sauce package directions. Add powder and heat, stirring constantly.
13. Gradually add butter while heating.
14. Arrange the turnips on a platter, place the veal rolls on top, and pour some sauce over the meat. Garnish with parsley. Serve any remaining sauce alongside.
